name: Texas Strip Dumplings
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix flour, salt, and baking soda.
2. Stir in buttermilk and oil until a dough forms.
3. Roll the dough out on a floured board.
4. Cut into strips.
5. Drop the strips into boiling chicken broth that has had about a drop of yellow food coloring added to it, along with a tablespoon of buttermilk.
6. Cover and boil for 12-14 minutes.
